label: Agent Enhanced
summary: The same alert window is upgraded with structured evidence, operator guidance, and replay-friendly export artifacts.

currentSlice.title: deny_burst_v1 triggered for service=udp/10004 on device=4c:7b:02:a2:c7:af
currentSlice.focus: The same current slice advances past alerting into evidence-backed suggestion emission, leaving a replayable narrative instead of a dead-end alert.

timeline.title: Deterministic threshold crossed
timeline.detail: The rule path emits the same warning alert as the baseline branch.

timeline.title: Suggestion packet emitted
timeline.detail: A structured evidence bundle with hypotheses, recommended actions, and confidence metadata is published for the active slice.

timeline.title: Operator action selected
timeline.detail: The responder approves the top-ranked action path after reviewing topology and recent change context in one place.

timeline.title: Remediation feedback recorded
timeline.detail: Closure metadata is attached back to the branch, making the run exportable for replay and later conference comparison.

controlBoundary.detail: The operator still owns the action, but the branch now exposes a structured path from alert to evidence to response.

exportArtifacts.detail: This branch can support replay, review, and figure generation because the alert, suggestion, action, and closure path are all visible.
